one_time_description: Robinson Huron Treaty past compensation settlement
economic_notes: Operates hotel (Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP 11.5% interest), building supply store (UCCM Building Material Supply LP 36.5%), dollar store (Your Dollar Store With More 100%), solar energy projects (Wikwemikong Renewable Energy LP), forestry (N'Swakamok Forestry Corporation), Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth LP (2.2337%), Hydro One indirect interest via Ontario First Nations Asset Management Corporation
notes: Massive one-time Robinson Huron Treaty past compensation of $1,312,042,516 dominates results, inflating accumulated surplus from $79M to $1.4B. Also a $934,188 Robinson Huron Treaty settlement included in regular revenues. Consolidated entities include Wiikwemkoong Board of Education, Wikwemikong Development Commission, Wikwemikong Tribal Police Service, Wikwemikong Nursing Home, Wikwemikong Property Management Company (Rainbow Ridge Golf Course), and FirstTEL Communications Corporation. Five entities accounted for by modified equity method. Net financial assets figure of $1,318,002,634 includes Robinson Huron Treaty settlement receivable of $1,312,976,704 on balance sheet. Tangible capital assets net book value not explicitly stated in the truncated text. CMHC deferred contributions of $1,873,234 newly appeared in 2024. Payable to Ontario Ministry of Long-Term Care cumulative balance of $4,697,803.
